item.title: This startup claims it can stop lightning and prevent catastrophic wildfires

item.title: OpenAI’s “compromise” with the Pentagon is what Anthropic feared
item.description: On February 28, OpenAI announced it had reached a deal that will allow the US military to use its technologies in classified settings. CEO Sam Altman ...
